channel.title: Comments on: Stone 09.09.09 Vertical Epic Ale – Ep. 93
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Keith
item.dc:creator: Keith
item.description: Hey Guys, Everything Ive ever tried from Stone has been good. I would love to get my hands on some of this beer. I really am going to have to get to Savannah one day soon and try all the great beers available in that area. Maybe on the way from NHC. David if your a homebrewer you have to hit NHC right? Are you entering beers in the regionals? if so good luck and watch out for me at NHC finals..I wish:-) Anyway great job again guys and see you at NHC!
item.content:encoded:
Hey Guys,
Everything Ive ever tried from Stone has been good. I would love to get my hands on some of this beer. I really am going to have to get to Savannah one day soon and try all the great beers available in that area. Maybe on the way from NHC. David if your a homebrewer you have to hit NHC right? Are you entering beers in the regionals? if so good luck and watch out for me at NHC finals..I wish:-) Anyway great job again guys and see you at NHC!
